title: Entity Split / Spinoff
subtitle: Record an entity split. Balance A = L + E before approving. Posting is deferred pending the backend journal-entry splice.
empty_description: Create an event to scope a carve-out, record the asset/liability/equity transfers to the new entity, and verify the balance-sheet equation before approving.

toast.approved: Event approved. Posting is deferred until the backend splice ships.

detail.label: SPINOFF EVENT
detail.transfers_empty_draft: No transfers yet. Add one per account moving to the new entity.
detail.posting_deferred_note: Note: posting is deferred pending the backend journal-entry splice. The approved event is locked; no further edits are possible.

balance.unbalanced: Balance sheet is NOT in balance

event_modal.label: NEW EVENT
event_modal.title: Create Spinoff Event
event_modal.lifecycle_hint: Lifecycle: Draft → Validated (A = L + E) → Approved → Posted (deferred). Cancellation is terminal from Draft or Validated.
event_modal.description_placeholder: e.g. Carve-out of the retail division into a standalone entity.
event_modal.error_generic: Failed to create event. Please try again.

transfer_modal.label: ADD TRANSFER
transfer_modal.title: Add Transfer
transfer_modal.classification_hint: Classification drives the balance-sheet equation: Assets on the left; Liabilities + Equity on the right.
transfer_modal.error_amount_format: Amount must be a decimal with up to 3 places.
transfer_modal.error_amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero.
transfer_modal.error_generic: Failed to add transfer. Please try again.
